steps.title: Identify the vertex meaning
steps.content: The graph shows estimated revenue on the $y$-axis and product price on the $x$-axis. The $y$-value of a point on the graph represents estimated revenue.

steps.title: Use the highest point
steps.content: The parabola opens downward, so its vertex is the highest point on the graph. Therefore, the $y$-value of the vertex represents the maximum estimated revenue. The answer is C.
